arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola names 'extraordinary' Man City duo who went under the radar in Tottenham win
arts.sum: Manchester City beat Tottenham in the Premier League on Wednesday night to move back into the top four and bounce back from the Real Madrid and Liverpool defeats.

arts.ttl: Dominic Solanke drops huge Tottenham injury return hint before Man City clash
arts.sum: Dominic Solanke has hinted he is close to returning from injury as Tottenham prepare for a huge Premier League clash against Manchester City. Watch the Premier League on TNT Sports

arts.ttl: What Nico Gonzalez was spotted saying to Pep Guardiola after being subbed off vs Tottenham - Journalist
arts.sum: Nico Gonzalez was spotted having a rather in-depth discussion with Pep Guardiola after he was brought off in Manchester City’s win at Tottenham. Gonzalez played...

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland breaks Man City's Spurs curse as Ange Postecoglou gamble fails
arts.sum: SPURS 0-1 MAN CITY: Pep Guardiola's side are now firmly back in the conversation for a Champions League spot and have their Norwegian goal machine to thank after another match-winning display

arts.ttl: Tottenham 0-1 Man City: Erling Haaland emulates Ruud Van Nistelrooy, Harry Kane scoring records in Premier League win
arts.sum: Erling Haaland emulates two Premier League scoring records held by Ruud van Nistelrooy and Harry Kane after scoring the only goal in Man City's 1-0 win at Tottenham on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Premier League forced to release Erling Haaland VAR statement during Tottenham vs Man City
arts.sum: Manchester City news as the Premier League explain why Erling Haaland's brace was disallowed against Tottenham Hotspur
“Yeah, important win and happy to be back,” declared Haaland in his post-match interview with City TV. In the end it’s a difificult game but we managed to win and that’s really important.

arts.ttl: 'Referee was clever' - Man City boss Pep Guardiola's verdict after Erling Haaland goal VAR confusion
arts.sum: Manchester City beat Tottenham in the Premier League on Wednesday night, securing victory through Erling Haaland's early goal.

arts.ttl: Spurs performance just missing a goal - Postecoglou
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur head coach Ange Postecoglou says his side were "just missing a goal" in their 1-0 defeat to Manchester City in the Premier League.
Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola says his side's 1-0 victory over Tottenham Hotspur in the Premier League was "really important".
